Description: **Okta Verify FIPS compliance** should require FIPS-compliant devices for enrollment when the organization mandates FIPS-approved authenticator usage.
Risk: **Non-FIPS Okta Verify enrollment** can let users authenticate with devices that do not meet required cryptographic assurance, weakening regulated access controls.

Code.Other: Security > Authenticators > Okta Verify: set FIPS Compliance to users enrolling in Okta Verify can use FIPS compliant devices only.

Recommendation.Text: **Enable FIPS compliance for Okta Verify** and restrict enrollment to FIPS-compliant devices where the organization requires FIPS assurance.
